summary: Iteration 2: tested multi-user auth, integrations (mock paths), per-user isolation, scheduler registration, and full UI flows. 22/22 backend pytest passed. Frontend: login gate, cookie-injected dashboard, connections sync, settings accent persistence, and chat all functionally work. Several requested data-testid attributes are missing on rendered UI elements (sign out, user avatar, integration cards, chat messages) — functionality is present but testids do not match spec.

missing_testids.found: visible 'Alex Carter' avatar but no testid
visible 'sign out' link but no testid — could not click programmatically
3 cards render correctly but testids absent
messages render and assistant reply visible (screenshot), but no chat-msg- testids

action_items: Add data-testid='sign-out-btn' to the sidebar 'sign out' button so sign-out flow can be programmatically verified.
Add data-testid='user-avatar' to the sidebar avatar element.
Add data-testid={`integration-card-${id}`} on each integration card in Connections.jsx.
Add data-testid={`chat-msg-${msg.id}`} on each chat message bubble in Chat.jsx (or a stable role-prefixed id) so message persistence can be asserted in UI tests.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py /api/auth/session sets cookie with secure=True, samesite='none' — correct for cross-site preview domain; verified.
scheduler.py: 'raku scheduler started' log present in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log on startup. sync_all and morning_checkin jobs registered.
server.py per-user scoping confirmed: all queries filter on user_id, _id excluded with projection.
server.py /api/integrations/{id}/sync mock path correctly adds 1 event/task on first call and dedupes on subsequent calls.
server.py /api/oauth/google/connect returns 503 when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID empty — correct.
Chat works via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present) — verified live response in UI screenshot.
Per-user isolation verified: tasks created by user A are not visible in user B's /tasks or /calendar.
test_credentials: Plant test session per /app/auth_testing.md (used during testing). Active test user: test_user_FE_1776856083563 / token test_session_FE_1776856083563 — leave or clean up via auth_testing.md cleanup section.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests plant temporary test_user_* and test_session_* rows in MongoDB (test_database) and clean them up via fixture teardown. One FE test session was planted manually for Playwright (still in DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend covered by /app/backend/tests/test_raku_backend.py (22 tests, all green). Auth testing pattern: plant Mongo session via auth_testing.md and use Authorization: Bearer header (or raku_session cookie for browser). Google/Notion env vars are intentionally empty — mock paths are the expected behavior. /api/oauth/google/connect should return 503 in this env. Scheduler runs at startup, daily morning_checkin job is registered for 13:00 UTC but won't fire during a test run. The Today greeting includes user's first name. CSS var --raku-accent updates on accent change and persists across reload. Only gap is missing data-testid attributes on a few UI elements (see frontend_issues.missing_testids).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failing tests. Frontend testid gaps are spec-vs-implementation mismatches, not bugs. Functionality is intact in all flows tested.
